The evidence from [87207] discusses the Far Cry series, specifically mentioning that the original Far Cry was a PC-only title for the first decade, with console versions arriving in 2014. However, this refers to the original Far Cry, not Far Cry 4. The 2014 Retrospective [57601] discusses notable games released in 2014, which aligns with the known release year of Far Cry 4.
